## Description

Please provide a clear description of what you're adding and why.

## Contribution Checklist

Before submitting your PR, please ensure you have checked the following:

- [ ] I have chosen my pillar and my PR targets the correct folder.
- [ ] My PR focuses on **one idea** (guidance, best practice, case study, or assessment criterion).
- [ ] I have followed the template in the pillar's `CONTRIBUTING.md` (if applicable).
- [ ] My contribution is vendor-neutral and avoids marketing language.
- [ ] I have kept the language clear and accessible to non-technical executives.

## Related Issues

(If this PR addresses an existing issue, please link it here: e.g., "Fixes #123")
